# map_input.txt — building with inaccessible sealed room
# 80x50 cm, height 18 cm.
# A solid internal wall at x=40 divides the building:
#   Left half  x=0..40  — accessible (drone starts here).
#   Right half x=40..80 — fully sealed, no door.
# Scenario: tests that sealed region appears as -1 in output.
#
# Format: x,y,z,status  (status 1 = occupied)

# --- Floor (z=0) ---
